note: Sources checked daily by the promo watcher. Edit freely — add/remove firms, fix affiliate URLs. codeWorks true = code DTJ may be mentioned for that firm.
rules: CHECK THE FIRM'S OWN SITE FIRST with the per-firm `method` below — web search is a last resort only (2026-07-19 incident: search-first missed live sales on 5 of 7 firms while every homepage showed one in plain HTML).
Only publish a promo when the firm's own page/email clearly shows an active sale (percentage off, promo code, limited-time offer). Quote what the page actually says; include the end date when shown.

Always include the affiliate code DTJ in the message when codeWorks is true. NEVER publish a firm's sitewide code (JULY, NOFEE40, VAULT, SAVENOW, 300k, JLFLEX...) — OWNER-CONFIRMED 2026-07-19 (Tyler): DTJ always matches every firm's sitewide promo pricing, so stating the % with DTJ is correct. Still report sitewide codes in the run summary.
The banner id must be unique per promotion (e.g. tradeify-40off-2026-07-19) and STABLE while that promo is unchanged.
Banner url must ALWAYS be the firm's affiliateUrl — that's how clicks are attributed to Tyler.

NEVER write 'no current sale' — that asserts a fact a failed check cannot know. When no promo can be verified and there is no defaultMessage, the fallback line is exactly: '<Firm> — code DTJ works anytime.'
Never invent a promo. If unsure whether it's active, use the fallback line and flag the firm in the summary.

A firm may carry defaultMessage (an OWNER-VERIFIED standing offer, e.g. Bulenox's perpetually-extended sale). Use defaultMessage whenever no FRESHER verified promo exists; expiring promos fall back to defaultMessage.

sources.name: Apex Trader Funding
sources.method: WebFetch gets 403 — use curl with a browser User-Agent, then grep the HTML for '% Off' (verified 2026-07-19: 'Any Size Evals up to 90% Off | Use code SAVENOW').

sources.name: Take Profit Trader
sources.method: WebFetch works; promo banner in plain HTML at the top (verified 2026-07-19: '40% Off For Life + Never Pay An Activation Fee', code NOFEE40).

sources.name: Tradeify
sources.method: WebFetch works; promo in the top announcement bar with an end date (verified 2026-07-19: '40% OFF 5 TIME USE, THEN 30% OFF', code JULY, ends 31 July 11:59PM EST).

sources.name: Lucid Trading
sources.method: WebFetch gets 403 — curl with a browser UA, then grep for 'LucidPricingConfig' (JSON: planDiscounts.LucidPro['50K'] is the Pro-eval %; Flex/Direct listed too) and id="promoCode" for the sitewide code (verified 2026-07-19: Pro 40%, Flex/Direct 30%, code VAULT).

sources.name: MyFundedFutures
sources.method: WebFetch works; promo banner near the top (verified 2026-07-19: '50% OFF. Your Choice: Rapid, Builder (50K Only), or Pro', code 300k).

sources.name: FundedNext Futures
sources.method: WebFetch https://fundednext.com/futures — the plain homepage does NOT show the futures promo; the pricing section carries it (verified 2026-07-19: 'SAVE 47% WITH CODE JLFLEX'). Tiered banners: use the headline percentage.

sources.name: Bulenox
sources.codeNote: Bulenox honors both DTJ and DTJ7
sources.method: Do NOT scrape the website. Check Gmail: from:support@bulenox.com newer_than:3d, subject like 'new promotion added to your dashboard'. No email = promo unchanged (fall back to defaultMessage).
sources.defaultMessage: Bulenox — up to 89% off evaluations; use code DTJ.
sources.defaultNote: Owner-verified 2026-07-19 (Tyler): Bulenox keeps extending this sale without emailing; treat up-to-89%-off as the standing default.
